name: IRC_DESCRIPTIONS_VL
query: SELECT B.DESCRIPTION_ID, B.DESCRIPTION_CODE, B.DESCRIPTION_TYPE_CODE, B.VISIBILITY_CODE, B.STATUS_CODE, TL.NAME, B.MODULE_ID MODULE_ID, B.COLLABORATOR_RESP_TYPE_LIST COLLABORATOR_RESP_TYPE_LIST, B.CAPTURE_INTERACTION CAPTURE_INTERACTION, B.USE_NO_REPLY_FLAG, TL.INTERACTION_CONTENT INTERACTION_CONTENT, B.MESSAGE_TRACKING_START_DATE, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM IRC_DESCRIPTIONS_B B, IRC_DESCRIPTIONS_TL TL WHERE B.DESCRIPTION_ID = TL.DESCRIPTION_ID AND TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
